questions.q: U.S. President Donald Trump recently stated he asked which global leader in a letter not to provide weapons to Iran?
U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent accused China of being an 'unreliable partner' by hoarding what commodity during the Middle East war?
An undercover investigation caught a hospital reusing syringes, which is linked to an HIV outbreak among over 300 children in which country?
According to U.S. Central Command, how many merchant vessels were turned back during the first 24 hours of the U.S. naval blockade on Iranian ports?
Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni announced that Italy is suspending the automatic renewal of its defence agreement with which country?
